title: Enterprise Typography
description: Typography guidance for professional enterprise applications

fontFamily.usage: Source Sans 3 for all interface text

principles.title: Readability First
principles.description: Text must be comfortable for extended reading

principles.title: Visual Hierarchy
rules: Don't use heading styles for emphasis
Primary action text should be larger than secondary

principles.title: Consistent Sizing
rules: Don't go below 12px for any text

scale.useFor: Hero text, marketing headers (rare in enterprise)

commonMistakes.problem: Breaks semantic hierarchy, confuses screen readers
commonMistakes.solution: Use weight or color for emphasis, not heading styles
Limit to 3-4 sizes: title, section, body, caption
Max 75 characters, use max-width for content areas
Use engineering-600+ for body text, not engineering-400

commonMistakes.problem: Hard to read, looks like shouting
commonMistakes.solution: Use sentence case, bold for emphasis

bestPractices: Use sentence case for buttons and navigation
Labels should be noun Phrase, not verb phrases
Table headers should be brief and scannable
Error messages should be human-readable sentences
Placeholder text is not a substitute for labels
Use active voice: 'Save changes' not 'Changes saved'
Be concise: 3 words better than 10 when possible
